title: Meeting at the Supermarket
description: Learn basic greetings and how to introduce yourself in Dutch at a supermarket.

content.text: Welcome to your first Dutch lesson! We'll focus on everything you need to know for a successful trip to a Dutch supermarket, 'de supermarkt'.

content.title: Meeting Someone New
content.setting: You are in the supermarket and meet someone new. You want to introduce yourself.

conversation_flow.title: State your name
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Ik heet Alex. Hoe heet jij?

extract_info.user_name: Extract the user's name from their message

conversation_flow.title: Say it's nice to meet them

content.title: Buying Fruit
content.setting: You approach the fruit section and a store employee offers to help you.

conversation_flow.title: Ask for an apple
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Natuurlijk. Eén appel. Anders nog iets?

conversation_flow.title: Say that's all
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Prima. Dat is dan één euro, alstublieft.

content.text: Great job! You can now greet someone, introduce yourself, and buy an apple in Dutch. In the next lesson, we'll visit a famous Dutch fish stand!
